_doc: CONVENTION cross_repo_blocker — priority ≥ 95 for any entry that blocks another repo's work.
_scope: applies to reports/n6_blockers.json, reports/n6_gap_proposals.json, and any future inbox intake.

categories.lang_gap: hexa-lang blocker — language/compiler primitive missing that other repos depend on.
categories.infra_gap: airgenome blocker — host/build/plist/launchd issue affecting cross-repo automation.
categories.atlas_gap: nexus/n6 blocker — atlas.n6 or atlas.signals.n6 drift/damage affecting consumers.
categories.data_gap: anima blocker — cert/weight/ckpt gap affecting downstream training or verification.
